category_sources: source_facts.description says LibRaw reads RAW files from digital photo cameras; official docs describe LibRaw as a RAW image decoder library.
display_name_sources: Official LibRaw documentation and site branding use LibRaw capitalization; source_facts.name is libraw.
docs_sources: Official LibRaw documentation page is dedicated to the RAW image decoder library and includes API, compilation, and examples sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LibRaw site announces github.com/LibRaw/LibRaw as the LibRaw GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names RAW digital photo camera files; official docs describe RAW decoding and supported RAW formats.
